LangGeneral.summonDeathFail.text: There is no response from the onyx tarot card.
LangGeneral.summonDeathSuccess.text: Death emerges from the onyx tarot card.
SourceChara.death.name: Death
SourceChara.nier.name: Nier
SourceElement.DMG.detail: Ability to increase the damage of physical attacks.
SourceElement.DMG.name: Damage Modifier
SourceElement.featEternalVow.detail: Your death brings rage and ruin.
SourceElement.featEternalVow.name: Eternal Vow
SourceElement.featEternalVow.textExtra: Death is enraged when you die, Your Beloved gains Damage and Damage Reduction, Everyone else can’t Heal and takes Increased Damage.
SourceElement.featEternalVow.textPhase: Your death incites rage and fear.
SourceElement.featLoversDeathsDemise.det: The deaths of your allies incurs your wrath.
SourceElement.featLoversDeathsDemise.tex: When your allies fall you gain power, Increasing Damage, Increasing Damage Reduction
You gain power when your allies fall.
SourceElement.featMyBeloved.detail: Your presence makes your beloved strong.
SourceElement.featMyBeloved.name: My Beloved
SourceElement.featMyBeloved.textExtra: When with your Beloved they gain power, Increased Speed, Increased Damage Reduction
SourceElement.featMyBeloved.textPhase: You grant power to your beloved.
SourceElement.r_DMG.name: DMG Multiplier
SourceElement.r_SPD.name: Speed Multiplier
SourceElement.SPD.name: Speed
SourceElement.SpSummonDeath.detail: Summons the Primal Beast Death to assist you in combat.
SourceElement.SpSummonDeath.name: Summon Death
SourceElement.StEvokeDeath.detail: Evokes the Major Arcana: Death, bringing forth a World of Death and Love.
SourceElement.StEvokeDeath.name: World of Death and Love
SourceStat.ConDeathDomain.detail: A condition where the waltz of Death drives you to violence.
SourceStat.ConDeathDomain.name: Death’s Waltz
SourceStat.ConEternalVow.detail: A condition where your loss becomes your strength.
SourceStat.ConEternalVow.name: Eternal Vow
SourceStat.ConEternalVow.textEnd: Your rage subsides, leaving only grief.
SourceStat.ConEternalVow.textPhase: Your grief gives way to rage. Death’s enraged wail sounds out.
SourceStat.ConLoversDeathsDemise.detail: A condition where you grow stronger with each ally who falls.
SourceStat.ConLoversDeathsDemise.name: Lovers Death’s Demise
SourceStat.ConMyBeloved.detail: A condition where your bond with Nier fills you with power.
SourceStat.ConMyBeloved.name: My Beloved
SourceStat.ConMyBeloved.textEnd: The warm embrace fades. You feel anguish.
SourceStat.ConUnfinishedBusiness.detail: A condition where the Death’s enraged wails have weakened you. You cannot heal.
SourceStat.ConUnfinishedBusiness.name: Unfinished Business
SourceStat.StanceEvokeDeath.detail: A condition where you evoke the Major Arcana: Death, bringing forth a World of Death and Love.
SourceStat.StanceEvokeDeath.name: World of Death and Love
SourceStat.StanceEvokeDeath.strPhase: Evoking World of Death and Love
SourceStat.StanceEvokeDeath.textPhase: #1 evoke(s) Death, bringing for the World of Death and Love.
SourceThing.nier_dagger.detail: A dagger brought forth by impending death. Its gleaming scarlet point beckons to its victims, a disguised invitation down the path of ruin.
SourceThing.nier_dagger.name: Pain of Death
